title: What is C++?
description: Discover the power and history behind C++.

slides.title: Welcome to C++! 🌟
slides.content:
C++ is one of the most popular and powerful programming languages in the world.

Created by Bjarne Stroustrup in 1979 as an extension of the C programming language, it gives programmers a high level of control over system resources and memory.

quizData.question: Who created C++?
quizData.explanation: C++ was created by Bjarne Stroustrup as an extension of the C language.

slides.title: Why Learn C++? 🚀
slides.content:
C++ is everywhere! It is used for:

* **Game Development**: Fast and efficient (e.g., Unreal Engine).
* **Operating Systems**: macOS, Windows, and Linux components.
* **Web Browsers**: Chrome and Firefox engines.
* **Embedded Systems**: Smartwatches, medical devices, and cars.

It is compiled, meaning the code is translated directly into machine-readable instructions, making it blazing fast! ⚡

quizData.question: C++ code is converted directly into machine instructions, making it very fast.
quizData.explanation: C++ is a compiled language, meaning it translates to machine code that the computer can execute very quickly.
